concepts.name: a bicycle with a woven grass nest lodged in the handlebars
a cracked bicycle helmet hanging on a single hook
concepts.blurb: the whole arc, one small nail

concepts.name: a splattered white bird dropping shaped like a face
concepts.blurb: weirdly seen and refusing to look back

concepts.name: a rusted kickstand bent at the wrong angle
concepts.blurb: the angle that means giving up

concepts.name: a deflated inner tube coiled on a garage floor
concepts.blurb: the circuit that no longer holds

concepts.name: a single broken spoke pulled loose from a wheel rim
concepts.blurb: one line that quit the pattern

concepts.name: a torn bike lock cable with frayed steel ends
